calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before This Date.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before This Date.
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Continued To Jul-20-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Amanda Ebey, Esq. appearing representing Christine M. Orsborn, Administrator.

Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jul-20-2026 at 09:00 a.m. in Department 204 pursuant to the request of the administrator.

Judge: Michael McNaughton; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before This Date.
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Continued To Jun-01-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Amanda Ebey for administrator Christine M. Orsborn (via Zoom).

The matter was called for Status on Close of Estate.

Ms. Ebey reported that a petition for final distribution has been prepared but has not yet been filed because she is awaiting additional information from her client to complete the filing.

The Court continued the matter to June 1, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before This Date.
Off Calendar Feb-02-2026 Continued To Mar-30-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Amanda Ebey for administrator Christine M. Orsborn (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Ms. Ebey reported that filing had been delayed due to issues with formatting and stated that she expected to file within approximately two weeks.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to March 30, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petitons For Letters Of Administrarion
Off Calendar Jan-29-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Amanda Ebey, Esq., for Christine Orsborn, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court confirms with counsel that she mailed notice with today's hearing date and that she has not received any returned mail from the post office regarding notice to Karen Heege of this hearing. The court waives any defective notice. The court asks if there are any appearances to object to this matter. This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Christine M. Orsborn is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $265,000. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status hearing is set for Feb-02-2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Personal Representative shall file either a petition for order for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. Code Sec.12200 et seq. two weeks before this date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petitons For Letters Of Administrarion
Off Calendar Dec-30-2024 Continued To Jan-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
